# Profitable Barbers

> Premium 1-on-1 mentorship helping barbers turn their clippers into capital and scale their barbershop to 6 figures.

Profitable Barbers is a coaching program by CutByDack that teaches working barbers the exact systems used to grow client booking, retention, and revenue. Students apply through a qualification form and receive direct mentorship.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Profitable Barbers program, student results, social proof, and the application form.
- [Apply](/apply): Standalone qualification form for 1-on-1 barber coaching.
- [Intro](/intro): Short introduction page leading into the application flow.
